claims.summary: The dynamic-noise pressure-room transition may feel mushy in overpacked states.
claims.rationale: Retuning dynamic exploration noise changes live ESN substrate behavior and requires Mike/operator approval.

claims.summary: Entropy above the volatile ceiling should be observed for tail-vibrancy collapse under high-entropy dampening.
claims.rationale: Existing ESN review helpers and tests cover dynamic-noise pressure room and entropy-dampening edges as read-only evidence.

claims.summary: `DYNAMIC_NOISE_GRADIENT_ADAPTIVE` could scale noise inversely with density gradient when pressure risk is elevated.
claims.rationale: Adaptive noise scaling would mutate live exploration-noise behavior and remains an operator-gated substrate change.
